# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **WASM .NET 11 and bug fixes**

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 adds WASM support for .NET 11 and fixes a native resource leak in SKImage. This release ships Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries for WASM .NET 11 targets and merges the latest upstream Skia m151 bug fixes. It also corrects a native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData when a crop rectangle is supplied.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Upstream Skia m151 bug fixes merged** — The latest bug fixes from the chrome/m151 branch have been pulled into the bundled Skia engine, improving rendering correctness across all platforms. ([#4443](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4443))

## Platform

- **WASM .NET 11 support via Emscripten 5.0.6** — Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries are now included for WASM targets, enabling SkiaSharp to build and run under .NET 11 on WebAssembly. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#4459](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4459))

## Bug Fixes

- **Native resource leak fixed in SKImage.FromEncodedData with crop** — Calling SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) previously leaked a native image handle when the crop rectangle was supplied. The extra reference is now released correctly. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!
